title: 10 Things a Man Does Before He's Ready to Lead
caption:
You're not waiting for a title. You're waiting until you feel ready.

The problem: readiness isn't a feeling. It's a track record. Every man God placed in front of a room had a season of faithfulness before it — usually longer and quieter than he wanted.

The man who leads well is the man who was already doing these things before anyone was watching. He got himself under authority. He killed the secret thing. He showed up early, stayed late, and apologized first.

Leadership costs something going in. The man who hasn't paid yet isn't ready — and he usually knows it.

Save this for the man in the formation season. He doesn't look important yet. He will.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #scripture #christianity #disciplemaking #masculinity
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
